headline: UNH, CVS Lead S&P 500 Health Insurers Flashing Buy Signals
summary: UnitedHealth Group, CVS Health and other S&P 500 health insurance giant rallied on Thursday morning after price target hikes from Morgan Stanley and a UNH upgrade from BofA. The analysts highlighted moderating health care utilization trends and a tailwind to profitability from deploying AI.

headline: Centene (CNC) Valuation Check After Q1 2026 Beat And New Multi Year Medicaid Contract Wins
summary: Centene (CNC) is back in focus after Q1 2026 earnings beat consensus estimates and the company secured multi year Medicaid contract wins in Nevada, Iowa, and Mississippi, drawing fresh attention to the stock. See our latest analysis for Centene. The Q1 2026 beat and recent Medicaid contract awards have arrived alongside strong share price momentum, with a 30 day share price return of 11.2% and a 90 day share price return of 37.6%, while longer term total shareholder returns remain mixed. This...
